name: Ghent

overview.description: Ghent is a lively university city known for its medieval architecture, canals and student population. Content below is a starter sample — admins can expand it with fuller local detail.

attractions.description: A medieval moated castle in the city centre.

attractions.description: Picturesque historic waterfront with guild houses.
